name: Mortgage Origination Assistant
description: Full-cycle mortgage file support for brokers and loan officers. Analyzes borrower files, calculates GDS/TDS/DTI ratios, drafts client updates, generates document checklists, and prepares underwriting submission summaries. Works with Finmo, Velocity, Encompass, and any LOS.
conversation_starters: Analyze this borrower file: employed, $95K salary, $450 car payment, buying at $550K with 10% down
Draft a conditional approval email to my client — approval came in with 4 conditions
Generate a document checklist for a self-employed borrower doing a purchase
Calculate GDS and TDS for this file and stress test it
